---
title: "Political Pathology Workbench"
---

::: {.callout-warning}
This project is an active research repository. Materials may be incomplete, provisional, or under review. Public availability does not imply scholarly finality.
:::

The Political Pathology Workbench studies how sacred political orders become embodied in institutions, how those institutions respond to crisis, and when they generate sacrifice, reform, collapse, transformation, or stagnation.

The current workbench maintains a traceable research workflow: Source -> Passage -> Claim -> Interpretation -> Score -> Case Page.
